---
title: "BLOCK 1 Formative Submission"
params: 
    SHOW_SOLS: FALSE
    TOGGLE: TRUE
format: html
---

```{r}
#| include: false
library(tidyverse)
source('assets/dropdowns.R')
source('assets/setup.R')
```

:::frame
__Dataset: YYYY.csv__

**Background**
lorem ipsum blah blah blah  
I want to know about **X?**


:::

`r qbegin(label="**SKILL:** I can manage libraries/packages in R.", qlabel=FALSE)`


open new R script. load X package

`r qend()`
`r solbegin(show=params$SHOW, toggle=params$TOGGLE)`

`r solend()`



`r qbegin(label="**SKILL:** I can extract specific subsets of a given dataset.    ",qlabel=FALSE)`

print out just the data for "Anonymous Aardvark". 

`r qend()`
`r solbegin(show=params$SHOW, toggle=params$TOGGLE)`

`r solend()`


`r qbegin(label="**SKILL:** I can describe in writing the variables used in a statistical analysis.", qlabel=FALSE)`
  
provide a written description of the sample in the study

`r qend()`
`r solbegin(show=params$SHOW, toggle=params$TOGGLE)`

`r solend()`
